About the Property

Boutique Residential Living
on Sultanpur Road

Paradise Town is a thoughtfully planned boutique residential project by Awadh Empire Infrabuild, spread across 4 acres on Sultanpur Road, Lucknow. Comprising 100 residences across a single self-contained phase, the project offers an intimate community setting with a full suite of modern amenities.

With possession targeted for March 2026, Paradise Town is being developed with an RCC framed structure — combining the best of architecture and specifications, both inside and outside — ensuring lasting durability and refined finishing for every home.

The Sultanpur Road locality has earned a strong 4.3 out of 5 resident satisfaction rating (155 reviews), reflecting the quality of everyday life here. The area recorded an impressive 8.7% price appreciation last quarter and 9.5% year-on-year growth, making Paradise Town a sound lifestyle and investment choice.

Residents enjoy excellent connectivity — with Amethi railway station nearby, easy public transport, well-maintained roads, and markets within walking distance. Good schools, seamless cab and auto access, and no traffic congestion add to the exceptional liveability of the area.

Why Choose Paradise Town

Eight Reasons to Call This Home

Prime Sultanpur Road Location

Locality rated 4.3/5 by residents with 8.7% price appreciation last quarter and 9.5% YoY growth — a proven corridor of value.

Club House & Recreation

A full-featured clubhouse anchors the community, complemented by a jogging track, basketball court, and dedicated children's play area.

Secure Gated Community

24x7 security personnel, CCTV surveillance, and a controlled entrance lobby ensure safety and peace of mind around the clock.

Boutique Scale — 100 Homes

Only 100 residences across 4 acres in a single integrated phase — offering the privacy and cohesion of a true neighbourhood community.

Possession March 2026

Under active construction with a clear timeline. RCC framed structure being built to the best architectural and finishing standards.

Green & Sustainable

Landscape garden, rainwater harvesting, sewage treatment plant, and paved compound — sustainability built into the community's DNA.

Vastu Compliant Design

All residences planned with Vastu principles at their core, harmonising space, light, and energy for well-being and positive living.

Exceptional Connectivity

Amethi railway station nearby, good public transport, markets within walking distance, good schools, and easy cab and auto availability.

Pricing

Transparent Pricing, No Hidden Costs
